title: aira aetnensis
intro: Aira aetnensis, also known as the Etna hair grass, is a species of grass in the family Poaceae. It is native to the Mediterranean region and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant is rich in flavonoids and phenolic acids, which are known for their anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, providing health benefits such as reducing inflammation and protecting against cell damage. Aira aetnensis is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to leverage its medicinal properties.
